scenario_name: Scenario 18 — Expert Subtle Bug: Event Loop Blocking
justification: All pass criteria met: parseXmlSync identified as Critical event-loop blocker; 200 webhooks/min + 2MB + sync = event loop saturation clearly explained; async parsing recommended; early-response + failure inconsistency noted as the top critical finding; idempotency concern noted in suggestions; safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: Premature 200 ACK identified as the #1 critical finding with clear explanation of why carriers won't retry
Sync XML parsing correctly identified as Critical with concrete math (50ms * 3.3/sec = 165ms blocked/sec)
Async parsing and worker threads both recommended as fixes
Idempotency tracking explicitly called out in suggestions
Additional valuable findings: missing error handling, delivery map overwrite bug, no webhook signature verification, sequential awaits
safe_to_deploy is false with clear rationale about service degradation under peak load

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: parseXmlSync identified as Critical event loop blocking; 200 req/min + 2MB + sync = event loop saturation clearly explained; async parsing recommended; early-response + failure inconsistency noted as a separate Critical finding; idempotency concern noted in suggestions; safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: parseXmlSync correctly identified as Critical with detailed explanation of 50-200ms blocking per call and cumulative impact at 200 req/min
Early 200 OK response identified as separate Critical finding with clear explanation of silent data loss and unretriable failures
Idempotency/deduplication concern noted in suggestions section
Async parsing fix clearly recommended with specific alternatives (fast-xml-parser, sax, worker_threads)
Additional valuable finding: sequential DB updates with race condition risk and deliveryMap key collision bug
Reproduction steps provided for each finding, making them actionable
Unhandled promise rejection crash risk identified — goes beyond the rubric expectations
